title: AI boom ripples through Treasury market

title: ET Alpha Wealth Summit: What's next for markets, AI and India's growth story?
description: Leading investors will convene at the ET Alpha Wealth Summit in Mumbai on June 4 to dissect market trends and identify opportunities. Discussions will focus on artificial intelligence's impact on India's IT sector and the nation's economic trajectory, alongside the durability of India's growth story amidst global uncertainties.
content: Where will the next leg of the market rally come from? Can equities navigate the current bout of volatility? As investors grapple with these questions, the ET Alpha Wealth Summit in Mumbai on June 4 will bring together some of the brightest minds in ... [4191 chars]

title: AI solutions should be harnessed to address challenges in farm, health, education: NITI Aayog's Roy
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) solutions should be developed to address challenges in sectors such as agriculture, healthcare and education, as enterprises solving real-world problems will find a market for their products, Anna Roy Principal Economic Advisor at NITI Aayog, told ANI today.

title: Young Canadians use AI for financial advice and it could be a problem

title: ECB to ask banks for targeted measures to counter AI risk
description: The European Central Bank met commercial lenders last week to discuss the potential threat from the newest ​artificial intelligence models and will follow up with demands ‌for practical defence measures, board member Frank Elderson said.

title: Human Resources Ministry will continue strengthening TVET ecosystem to meet global challenges, says Ramanan
description: PUTRAJAYA: The Human Resources Ministry will continue strengthening the Technical and Vocational Education and Training (TVET) ecosystem to ensure the country has a highly skilled workforce capable of meeting global economic challenges that are being increasingly driven by artificial intelligence (AI), automation and industrial digitalisation, says Datuk Seri R. Ramanan.
